title: CBIC Revises Customs Jurisdiction Areas for Smoother Operations
content:
# CBIC Revises Customs Jurisdiction Areas for Smoother Operations

Ek important update hai! The Central Board of Indirect Taxes and Customs (CBIC) ne Customs Act, 1962 ke under customs areas of jurisdiction ko revise kiya hai. Yeh changes Notification No. 56/2026-Customs (N.T.) dated June 16, 2026, ke through announce kiye gaye hain.

Yeh amendments Notification No. 21/2022-Customs (N.T.) ko modify karte hain aur inka effect immediately hai, jaise hi ye Official Gazette mein publish hue hain.

**Key Changes:**

*   **Notification Reference:** Yeh update Notification No. 56/2026-Customs (N.T.), dated June 16, 2026, ke through aaya hai.
*   **Immediate Effect:** The revised jurisdictional framework is effective immediately upon its publication in the Official Gazette.
*   **Amendment to Serial Number 18:** Jurisdiction table ke Serial Number 18 se ek existing item ko omit kiya gaya hai, aur uske baad ki entries ko renumber kiya gaya hai.
*   **Amendment to Serial Number 20:** Serial Number 20 ke under jurisdiction ko revise kiya gaya hai. Ab ismein explicitly Chhatrapati Shivaji International Airport (International Terminal), Municipal Corporation of Greater Mumbai ke under ke areas aur airports, aur Maharashtra ke Thane, Palghar, aur Raigad districts ke areas aur airports shamil hain.
*   **Objective:** In changes ka primary aim administrative oversight aur customs operations ko streamline karna hai, jisse territorial jurisdiction mein clarity aur efficiency aaye.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.cbic.gov.in/)

*Published on: 17 June 2026*
